Package dk.mada.jaxrs.model.types

Class TypeVoid

java.lang.Object
dk.mada.jaxrs.model.types.TypeVoid
All Implemented Interfaces:
Type
public final class TypeVoid extends Object implements Type
Special type for handing void type.
